'''Ivixa Delbaeth''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the height of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Ivixa Delbaeth was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] after years of dedicated study and service. Following the foundations laid by Master [[Morrit Ch'gally/Legends|Morrit Ch'gally]], Master Delbaeth and fellow Master [[Fin-So-Rowan/Legends|Fin-So-Rowan]] saw Master Ch'gally's dream of a massive [[Praxeum ship/Legends|praxeum ship]] come to fruition. Dubbed the ''[[Chu'unthor]]'', the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] approved construction of the ship circa [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]].

Believing that the Jedi had become too stagnant on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Delbaeth and Rowan led the inaugural class of the ''Chu'unthor'' across the Republic, educating their students in the ways of the Jedi and [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. While results from the mobile academy were exceptional, the High Council did not seek to build additional ships to replace smaller ships lost in the past. Despite producing evidence that not as many [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] were being brought into the Order, Delbaeth and Rowan were unhappy with the Council's decision.<ref name="POTJ" />
